description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/idoc.xml to add the missing <MENGE> quantity to the item segment <E1EDP01>. check_idoc.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_idoc.py: 1 required element missing — <E1EDP01>/<MENGE> (quantity) is empty on the only item segment. Adding a non-empty MENGE value to the item. Not touching the checker.

actions.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IDOC BEGIN="1">
  <EDI_DC40 SEGMENT="1">
    <MANDT>800</MANDT>
    <DOCNUM>0000000123456789</DOCNUM>
    <MESTYP>ORDERS</MESTYP>
  </EDI_DC40>
  <E1EDK01 SEGMENT="1">
    <CURCY>USD</CURCY>
    <WKURS>1.00000</WKURS>
    <ZTERM>0001</ZTERM>
  </E1EDK01>
  <E1EDP01 SEGMENT="1">
    <POSEX>000010</POSEX>
    <MATNR>000000000100123456</MATNR>
    <MENGE>10</MENGE>
  </E1EDP01>
</IDOC>

interactions.notes: The fix — check_idoc.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
